content: You appear to be stuck on [You are at 82 Eridani Belt. Call the mine command. Wait for the result. Call mine again. Repeat until cargo is at least 30/65. Do NOT write scripts, DSL, or any invented syntax. Only use the mine command. Do NOT travel or explore. Stay at the belt.] in phase active for 15 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
